seoTitle: Daly vs Daly Waters — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Daly and Daly Waters. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Daly vs Daly Waters: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Daly and Daly Waters.
heading: Daly vs Daly Waters — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Daly, Northern Territory and Daly Waters, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Daly has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Daly Waters (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Daly or Daly Waters safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Daly has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Daly Waters scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Daly scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Daly Waters scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Daly or Daly Waters?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Daly has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
